narrative:
Franklin Township has 2,077 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.1 percentage points.
